scripts.deploy:prod: bunx dotenv-cli -v STAGE=prod -e ../../.env.production -- bun ../alchemy-utils/src/alchemy-cli.ts deploy database
scripts.deploy:staging: bunx dotenv-cli -v STAGE=staging -e ../../.env.staging -- bun ../alchemy-utils/src/alchemy-cli.ts deploy database
scripts.destroy:prod: bunx dotenv-cli -v STAGE=prod -e ../../.env.production -- bun ../alchemy-utils/src/alchemy-cli.ts destroy database
scripts.destroy:staging: bunx dotenv-cli -v STAGE=staging -e ../../.env.staging -- bun ../alchemy-utils/src/alchemy-cli.ts destroy database
scripts.dev: bunx dotenv-cli -v STAGE=local -e ../../.env.local -- bun ../alchemy-utils/src/alchemy-cli.ts dev database
